scenario.name: boots_ship_and_grid
scenario.description: ship sprite (OAM slot 0, centered) + the Mode-7 grid terrain render at the rail start (the camera auto-advances, but the ship is centered with no input and the grid stays multi-color)

scenario.name: reticle_and_obstacles_render
scenario.description: the upgrade build: a lock-on reticle (OAM slot 11, the reticle CHR tile 76 = OBS_TILE_BASE 64 + obs_reticle $0C, small size) marks the aim point every frame, and approaching hazard obstacles render across the floor (extra distinct colors beyond the grid)
